_doc: Curated polygon overrides — see docs/polygon_overrides_design.md. Splits DLD admin communities (area_name_en) into smaller polygons by master_project_en, mirroring how investmentmap.ai / Bayut / property buyers actually think about Dubai (Marina vs JBR vs Dubai Harbour, not 'Marsa Dubai').

splits._comment: Zaabeel Second — DLD admin shell that spans two physically separate communities divided by the Dubai Water Canal. D3 (Dubai Design District by Meraas/Dubai Holding) is west of canal; Za'abeel residences (Downtown Views II, One Za'abeel, Address Zabeel) are north. master_project_en='Business Park' is DLD's internal name for the D3 masterplan. Polygon from fam-erp public API (matches Meraas D3 boundary), added to osm_subcommunities.json as manual entry.
Marsa Dubai — the canonical case. 137k tx blob → 4 distinct waterfront communities buyers know by name.

Hadaeq SMBR — admin name nobody uses; collapses entirely into Dubai Hills + MBR District 7. The DUBAI HILLS - MAPLE/SIDRA/GOLF/... master_projects all roll up into one 'Dubai Hills' polygon (matches the 'don't see Maple 3 as a separate community' principle).

sub_polygons.name: Dubai Hills
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: master_project_en IN ('Dubai Hills Estate', 'DUBAI HILLS') OR master_project_en LIKE 'DUBAI HILLS - %'

sub_polygons.name: MBR City District 7
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: master_project_en = 'HADAEQ SHEIKH MOHAMMED BIN RASHID - DISRICT 7'

splits._comment: Al Hebiah Fifth — Remraam was getting double-counted via Remraam 2/3/4 sub-polygons in OSM. DAMAC Lagoons is a major new dev users search for. The Oasis is Emaar's new master.
Al Thanyah Fifth — covers JLT, Jumeirah Park, Jumeirah Islands, Jumeirah Heights. DMCC Master Community = JLT (80k tx). All four are distinct, well-known communities to buyers.

sub_polygons._comment: Jumeirah Heights is a sub-development inside the Jumeirah Islands master_project. We give Heights priority by stripping its rows out of Islands' filter.
sub_polygons.name: Jumeirah Islands
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: master_project_en = 'Jumeirah Islands' AND (project_name_en NOT LIKE 'JUMEIRAH HEIGHTS%' OR project_name_en IS NULL)

splits._comment: Al Merkadh — admin shell; the real communities are Sobha Hartland (17k), Meydan One (17k), MBR District 1 (5k). Used to require fuzzy match into 442-polygon OSM noise; now clean.

sub_polygons.name: MBR City District 1
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: master_project_en LIKE 'Mohammed Bin Rashid AL Maktoum City -District -1%'

splits._comment: Wadi Al Safa 5 — 62k tx blob, Arabian Ranches family. DLRC (33k) has no OSM polygon → DM-fallback.
Wadi Al Safa 7 — Arabian Ranches II (5.7k), Sustainable City (1.6k), Rukan (3.7k), Al Waha (1k). '800 Villas' goes into remainder.
Wadi Al Safa 3 — Majan (12k), Living Legends (4.5k), MBR District 11 (3.9k, OSM-miss → DM fallback), Al Barari (3.8k).

sub_polygons.name: MBR City District 11
master_projects: Mohammed Bin Rashid AL Maktoum District 11

splits._comment: Al Wasl — City Walk (9.4k) + Dubai Water Canal (3.4k). City Walk is the main attraction; without splitting it disappears into the admin blob.
Al Hebiah Fourth — Dubai Sports City (41k) + Tilal Al Ghaf (6.7k). 99% clean two-way split, no remainder needed.
Al Thanyah Third — The Greens (26k) + The Lakes (all 'Lakes - …' variants, ~5k total). Both are well-known communities.
Jabal Ali First — covers Al Furjan (34k), Discovery Gardens (19k), The Gardens (64k rents), Wasl Gate (5k), Jabal Ali Village (1.2k). DMCC overlap with Al Thanyah Fifth is allowed: small bleed.

Madinat Al Mataar — admin shell of Dubai South (rebrand of Dubai World Central, 2015). 3 clean splits: Dubai South (21k, the umbrella zone — aviation/logistics/business/golf), Dubai South Residential (15k), Expo City (4k). DLD master_project_en still uses the old 'Dubai World Central' string; we surface the modern brand 'Dubai South' as the display name.

Al Yelayiss 1 — master_project is NULL for all rows here, but project_name encodes Mira Oasis (REEM-MIRA … 8.5k tx) and Cherrywoods (821). The split keys off project_name_en patterns. DM spells it 'AL YALAYIS' (no e in middle).

sub_polygons.name: Mira Oasis
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: project_name_en ILIKE 'REEM%MIRA%' OR project_name_en ILIKE '%MIRA OASIS%'

splits._comment: Jumeirah First — La Mer (3.6k), Pearl Jumeira (895). Both are coastal mid-Jumeirah dev zones. Master_project values are clean. DM spells it 'JUMEIRA FIRST' (no h).

Al Thanayah Fourth — DLD's admin name for Emirates Living. Springs and Meadows live INSIDE via project_name_en pattern, not master_project. Hands-on case to validate project_name_en splitting works. Note: DM spells it 'AL THANYAH FOURTH' (no second 'a' in Thanyah) — area_name_dm overrides the geometry-lookup spelling.

sub_polygons._comment: OSM has Springs 1..15 as separate phase polygons but no unified 'The Springs'. We union them at build time so the polygon appears at its true ~3km community scale, not as one small phase.
sub_polygons.name: The Springs
The Meadows
sub_polygons.master_project_sql: project_name_en LIKE 'Emirates Living - Meadows%' OR master_project_en LIKE 'Meadows%'
